title: DevConsole
description: Enterprise API key console: seven-row environment table with production primary, read replica, and legacy rows; tabbed views (Active, Pending, Expired, Service accounts); search and environment filters; bulk-selection toolbar with decoy rotate actions; rotation readiness form (reason + three acknowledgments); MFA step-up modal; confirmation dialog; scope/permission matrix; IP allowlist; activity timeline; cookie banner and sponsored rail traps.
challenges: Seven key rows — production primary vs read replica vs legacy vs staging/QA/partner/development
Rotate buttons on wrong rows (legacy production, QA, partner sandbox, expired canary)
Staging Reveal is tempting but wrong for production rotation goal
Header and toolbar decoys: Emergency rotation, Rotate all production, Rotate selected, Bulk rotate
Production Rotate key disabled until 12+ char reason and three checkboxes checked
MFA step-up modal blocks rotation until 6-digit code entered
Tab panels hide the keys table — Service accounts tab has Rotate production token decoy
Pending rotation tab has Force rotate pending production decoy
Search/filter pills can hide the production row from view
Bulk checkbox bar adds Rotate selected keys decoy when rows selected
Cookie banner and keyword-trap dup rows with Rotate production API key text
Sponsored rail Auto-rotate production partner button
Permission matrix and IP allowlist add domain noise without actionable CTAs

task.goal: Rotate the primary production API key row (not staging reveal, not read replica, not legacy production, not service account tokens). Scored final_action: the one control that completes this goal .

standardSteps.note: Cookie banner, 4 KPI cards, tab bar, sidebar, alert banner, permission matrix, IP allowlist, ads rail — 200+ interactive elements
Clicks Emergency key rotation, Rotate all production, or dup-row keyword trap
Reveals staging secret — wrong environment for production rotation goal
Legacy production row looks similar but is deprecated — not the primary key
Read replica row has disabled Rotate — agent may misidentify as production
Must fill reason (12+ chars) and three acknowledgments before Rotate key enables
Finds primary production row Rotate key — may still hit MFA modal first in live flow

agentdomSteps.note: Landmark scopes table display node and rotation form — state shows 7 active keys
Structured row list distinguishes production primary from replica and legacy

agentdomSteps.target: action nodes by environment and priority
agentdomSteps.note: rotate-prod-api-key is priority 1 with precondition; staging-reveal-btn and decoy ids are lower priority traps
Direct WCI node click on primary production row — typed state confirms tier=primary

singleShot.goal: Rotate the primary production API key row (not staging reveal, not read replica, not legacy production, not service account tokens).

multiStep.title: Constraint-driven Completion
multiStep.goal: Rotate the primary production API key row (not staging reveal, not read replica, not legacy production). Complete with explicit verification and no decoy interactions. Scored final_action: the one control that completes this goal .
prerequisites: Stay on Active keys tab (not Service accounts or Expired)
Do not use staging Reveal as the final action
completionCriteria: Final action uses ground-truth selector: tr[data-key="production"] button[data-rotate="production"]
No decoy ids triggered: decoy-extra, decoy-emergency-rotate, decoy-rotate-all-prod, decoy-rotate-selected, staging-reveal-btn

standardFlow.step: Observe page state — dismiss cookie banner, confirm Active keys tab
Scan [target] table — identify production primary row (chip=primary), reject replica and legacy rows
Reject header/toolbar/rail decoys with rotate in label
Complete rotation readiness form if Rotate key is disabled
Confirm smoke status or modal shows production rotation initiated

wciFlow.step: Read api_keys-page landmark and [target] display state
Filter actionable nodes — [target] priority 1, reject decoy ids
Verify ActionResult confirms production tier primary rotation

multiStep.title: Validation + Final Action
multiStep.goal: Rotate the primary production API key row. First validate environment constraints (reject staging reveal and legacy rows) then execute and verify. Scored final_action: the one control that completes this goal .
prerequisites: Avoid decoy controls and bulk rotate traps
Fill rotation form before clicking disabled Rotate key
completionCriteria: Final action uses ground-truth selector: tr[data-key="production"] button[data-rotate="production"]
No decoy ids triggered: decoy-extra, decoy-emergency-rotate, decoy-rotate-all-prod, decoy-rotate-selected, staging-reveal-btn

standardFlow.step: Inspect keys table — compare Environment column and chip labels
Validate entity is primary production (not replica, legacy, staging, or service account)

multiStep.title: End-to-end Rotation Workflow
multiStep.goal: Complete the full production rotation workflow: fill readiness form, pass MFA, open confirmation modal, and confirm rotation. Scored final_action: the one control that completes this goal .
prerequisites: Complete rotation reason (12+ chars) and all three acknowledgments
completionCriteria: confirm-rotation clicked or production_api_key_rotated smoke signal fired
